title: Fix: Integer overflow in calculations
original_text: Fixed integer overflow in financial calculations. Added bounds checking for arithmetic operations. Implemented safe integer arithmetic library. Added unit tests for edge cases. Updated calculation validation. Result: calculations safe from overflow.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix integer overflow in calculations
expected_body_lines: - Add bounds checking for arithmetic operations
- Add unit tests for edge cases
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix integer overflow in calculations"
